title: selliguea fraser-jenkinsii
intro: Selliguea fraser-jenkinsii, also known as the Himalayan polypody, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Selliguea fraser-jenkinsii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
